title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Getting to drive your dream vehicle can make life seem so much better. IDBI Bank offers Express Auto Loans for your dream vehicle. Our Auto loans are easy and quick to avail and we make sure you take on the roads faster with our quick processing of the loan. So, what are you waiting for? Just rush to book your dream car or bike (High end bikes costing minimum Rs. 1.20 lacs onwards) , while we take care of your loan requirement. 
  * IDBI Bank will help you get a higher sanction for funding your dream Vehicle
  * Our Auto loan covers wide range of car's, suv's and high end bikes
  * Repayment with easy EMIs and avail the loan for upto 7 years
  * To ensure a smooth ride our Auto loans offer attractive rate of interest
  * We have the tie-ups with dealers and Manufactures of vehicles and we make sure you will get the best deal 


  * Max age of the applicant (At loan Maturity): 70 years/retirement age whichever is earlier.
  * Income proof: Salary Slip, Form 16/ ITR, Bank statement showing salary credit


  * Max age of the applicant: (At loan Maturity): 70 years
  * Income proof: for Last 2 years with computation of income / certified financials, Balance Sheet, P & L A/c, Bank statement


Latest 2 months salary slips; Form 16/ ITR for last 2 years; Bank Statement reflecting salary credits for 4 months
Income Statement, Balance Sheet and ITR for last 2 years, Bank Statement for 6 months
Disclaimer : IDBI Bank may ask for additional document if required.
Repayment is done through Equated Monthly Installments (EMIs) comprising both principal and interest. 
Part payment/Foreclosure allowed after 6 months of loan disbursement from own source without penalty. Within 6 months of disbursement or by way of balance transfer 1% of balance outstanding plus applicable charges would be charged 
Provide your basic details to help us know you better.
###### Schedule of charges and Terms & Conditions applicable on Auto Loan
